name: Vanganga Lake Garden
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
description: A beautifully landscaped island garden featuring Japanese-style wooden bridges, paddle boating, and jogging tracks set amidst a serene lake.
history: Developed by the Dadra and Nagar Haveli administration as an eco-tourism park, its picturesque setting has made it a popular location for Bollywood film shoots.
famousFor: Island garden, Japanese bridges, paddle boating
